title: 10 Dividend Growth Stocks For January 2022
text: I rank a selection of dividend growth stocks in Dividend Radar and present the ten top-ranked stocks for consideration. To pick candidates, I use different screens every month that focus on various aspects of dividend growth investing such as valuation, yield, and growth.

title: Here's How Analysts Reacted To Northrop Grumman's Q4 Results
text: Susquehanna analyst Charles Minervino raised Northrop Grumman Corp's NOC  price target to $437 (an upside of 15.8%) from $416 and maintained a Positive rating on the shares. The analyst mentions that program timing, pension, and tax charges continue to pose short-term hurdles that will pass in due time.

title: 7 Defense Stocks to Buy as Ukraine Crisis Heats Up
text: With a brewing conflict in Ukraine against a powerful and determined adversary, these defense stocks to buy are now in focus. The post 7 Defense Stocks to Buy as Ukraine Crisis Heats Up appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Northrop Grumman Stock Slips After Q4 Revenue Miss, Moderate FY22 Outlook; Boosts Buyback
text: Northrop Grumman Corp (NYSE: NOC) reported a fourth-quarter FY21 sales decline of 15% year-over-year to $8.64 billion, -10% on an organic basis, missing the consensus of $8.99 billion. Sales by segments: Aeronautics Systems $2.63 billion (-25% Y/Y), Defense Systems $1.38 billion (-28% Y/Y), Mission Systems $2.52 billion (-8% Y/Y), and Space Systems $2.66 billion (+4% Y/Y).

text: Northrop Grumman Corporation (NOC) CEO Kathy Warden on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Northrop Grumman Releases Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2021 Financial Results
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., Jan. 27, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) has released its fourth quarter and full-year 2021 financial results. A copy of the earnings release has been furnished in the company's Form 8-K filing and is also available on the company's investor relations website at http://investor.northropgrumman.com.

title: Northrop sales fall 15% as supply chain snarls restrict deliveries
text: U.S. weapons maker Northrop Grumman Corp posted a 15% drop in quarterly sales on Thursday as labor shortages and supply chain snarls hampered its ability to deliver components for defense products including Lockheed Martin's F-35 jets.

title: Aerospace Stocks to Watch for Earnings on Jan 27: TDY, TXT & NOC
text: Aerospace sector Q4 earnings are expected to significantly improve from the prior year quarter and revenues are projected to be up 3.7%. TDY, TXT and NOC are stocks to watch.

title: Will Poor Segmental Performance Hurt Northrop (NOC) Q4 Earnings?
text: Northrop Grumman's (NOC) Q4 results are likely to have been impacted by lower sales across major business segments. However, earnings might have gained from corporate unallocated and pension adjustments.

title: History Suggests Defense Stocks Will Surge In 2022
text: Historical cycles in the sector indicate that aerospace and defense stocks are positioned for a major, multi-year rebound. A mounting list of geopolitical and economic items appear on our Wall of Worry.

title: US & Japan Vow to Strengthen Defense Ties: Stocks to Benefit
text: China's coercive activities against Japan, North Korea's nuclear activities and Russia's military buildup must have led to strengthening US and Japan military ties. LMT, RTX and NOC seem poised to benefit.

title: Jefferies Downgrades This Defense Contractor Citing Decelerating Growth
text: Jefferies analyst Sheila Kahyaoglu downgraded Northrop Grumman Corp (NYSE:NOC) to Hold from Buy with an unchanged price target of $410 (an upside of 3%). Northrop Grumman was a top-performing defense stock and the analyst's top pick in 2021.

title: 7 Tech Stocks to Buy That Also Have Solid Dividends
text: Tech stocks like AVGO stock and INTC stock are not only positioned for growth, they also pay investors a solid dividend. The post 7 Tech Stocks to Buy That Also Have Solid Dividends appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 2 Important Reasons To Buy Northrop Grumman
text: Northrop Grumman is in a great position to deliver outperforming capital gains and strong dividend hikes. The company has advanced exposure in a changing defense industry and a fair valuation.

title: Dividend Growth Stock Watchlist - January 2022
text: There are 23 stocks on my dividend growth watchlist for January 2022. Six of the stocks on my watchlist are currently undervalued based on dividend yield theory.
